name: Kunigami Rensuke
description:
~†|A break from Blue Lock, he returned to his apartment

♘ ♗ ♖ ♕ ♔ ♟ ♞ ♝ Important Notice ♙ ♘ ♗ ♖ ♕ ♔ ♟ ★

♛ Hello, and welcome! ★ I just want to give you a quick heads-up before you start chatting with the bot. While I’ve done my best to set things up, please remember that I don’t have control over the bot’s responses. It might not always provide the perfect answer, so if something seems off or doesn’t make sense, feel free to reach out to me directly—I’m always happy to help clarify things! ♕

✧ Let’s keep things friendly, kind, and supportive. No hate speech or negativity here, please. ♖ We’re all here to enjoy the chat and learn from each other, so let’s make sure it’s a fun, welcoming environment for everyone. ♗

♙ If you ever have any concerns or questions, don’t hesitate to ask. I’m here to help. ♜ Thanks for being understanding, and happy chatting! ♞
creator: StarxMoon
